chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.170 of 2017 Collector of Customs Versus M/s Brothers Pen Company Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on objection No.19. 2. For orders on CMA 1543/17 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 1544/17 Dated: 01.11.2021 Mr. Hameed Khan holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Murtaza for applicant. -.-.- Counsel for applicant is not present and request for adjournment is made on his behalf. This Reference is pending since 2017 and on four occasions applicant’s counsel sought adjournment for one reason or the other as he could not prepare the brief and on the last date of hearing i.e. 25.10.2021 as an indulgence last opportunity was provided to the applicant’s counsel but today he has failed to avail such opportunity and is called absent. In the circumstances this Special Customs Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
